title: Mistral AI OCR Response
description: Schema for a Mistral AI OCR response, containing structured page-by-page text extraction results from documents and images.

OcrPage.description: A single page of OCR results with extracted markdown content.

index.description: The zero-based page index in the document.

markdown.description: Extracted content in markdown format preserving headers, tables, and equations.

images.description: Extracted images from the page when include_image_base64 was enabled.

ExtractedImage.description: An image extracted from a document page.

id.description: Unique identifier for the extracted image.

PageDimensions.description: The dimensions of a document page.

pages.description: List of pages with extracted OCR content.

model.description: The model used for OCR processing.

usage.description: Usage statistics for the OCR request.
